start.welcome: ✅ Copilot Telegram Bot started 📂 Project: {cwd} 🤖 Model: {model} Use /help to see available commands.

commands.sessions: /sessions - List previous chat sessions to resume

logs.noPermission: ⛔ You don't have permission to view logs.
logs.title: 📋 Last {lines} lines: {content}

showplan.noPlanActive: ❌ No active plan Use /plan to create a plan first.
showplan.notFound: ❌ Plan not found The plan may have been deleted.

editplan.noPlan: ❌ No plan to edit Usage: /editplan [planId] Without argument, edits the current active plan. With argument, edits the plan with that ID.
editplan.notFound: ❌ Plan not found No plan exists with ID {planId}.
editplan.accessDenied: ❌ Access denied You don't have permission to edit this plan.
editplan.instructions: 📝 Edit Plan: {title} 1️⃣ Download this file 2️⃣ Edit it in your favorite editor 3️⃣ Send the modified file back to this chat The plan will be updated when you send the file.
editplan.fileTooLarge: ⚠️ File too large The file must be smaller than 10MB.
editplan.emptyFile: ⚠️ Empty file The file cannot be empty.
editplan.updateError: ❌ Error updating plan Couldn't save the plan. It may have been deleted.
editplan.updated: ✅ Plan updated successfully Changes have been saved.

exportplan.noPlan: ❌ No plan to export Usage: /exportplan [planId] Without argument, exports the current active plan. With argument, exports the plan with that ID.
exportplan.notFound: ❌ Plan not found No plan exists with ID {planId}.
exportplan.accessDenied: ❌ Access denied You don't have permission to export this plan.
exportplan.caption: 📄 Plan exported: {title}

plans.noPlans: 📋 You have no saved plans Use /plan to create your first plan.
plans.title: 📋 Your Plans ({count})
plans.hint: 💡 Use /showplan to view the active plan Use /exportplan [id] to export a plan

exitplan.exited: ✅ Plan Mode Deactivated You returned to normal mode and your conversation context was preserved.
exitplan.exitedWithSaved:
💾 The plan has been saved in the database.
Use /showplan to view it again.

sessions.title: 📋 Previous Chat Sessions
sessions.selectToResume: Tap a session to resume it:
sessions.resumed: ✅ Session resumed: {{summary}} 📂 {{cwd}} You can continue the conversation where you left off.
sessions.resumeNotFound: ❌ Session not found. It may have been deleted.

errors.generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.notAuthorized: ❌ You are not authorized to use this bot.
errors.operationInProgress: ⚠️ There is already an operation in progress. Please wait for it to complete.
errors.pathNotAllowed: ❌ Path is not in the allowed list.
errors.directoryNotExist: ❌ The current directory does not exist.
errors.invalidPathOrNotDirectory: ❌ Invalid path or not a directory.
errors.setupRequired: ⚠️ You must configure allowed directories first. Use /start
errors.specifyServerName:
❌ You must specify the server name.

Usage: /mcp_delete [name]
errors.configUpdated: ✅ Configuration updated. The new server is available.
errors.notInPlanMode: ℹ️ You are not in plan mode.
errors.noActiveSession: ℹ️ No active session to start a new chat
errors.pathNotAllowedShort: The current directory is not in the allowed paths list.
errors.pathNotAllowedDetailed:
The current directory is not in the allowed paths list.

Possible causes:
• The administrator has modified the security configuration
• The directory was removed from the allowed list

Please contact the bot administrator or use /cd to change to an allowed directory.

cd.title: 📁 Navigate Directories
cd.timeout: ❌ Session expired due to inactivity. Please start again with /cd.
cd.alreadyActive: You already have a wizard in progress. Use "Cancel" to cancel it first.
cd.noActiveWizard: No active wizard. Use /cd to start one.

addProject.title: 💾 Add Project
addProject.enterName: 📝 Enter the project name (letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only):
addProject.alreadyExists: ❌ A project with name '{name}' already exists.
addProject.alreadyActive: You already have a wizard in progress. Use "Cancel" to cancel it first.
addProject.invalidCharacters: ❌ Project name contains special characters not allowed. Use only letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores.
addProject.nameAlreadyExists: ❌ A project with the name "{name}" already exists.
addProject.noActiveWizard: No active wizard. Use /addproject to start one.
addProject.pathNotAllowedConfirm: ❌ Path not allowed. Cannot save project in this location.
addProject.step1Title: 📝 New Project - Step 1/3 Please send the project name. The name can contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores. Examples: MyProject, My Project, project_2024
addProject.step3Title: 📋 New Project - Step 3/3: Confirmation 🏷️ Name: {name} 📁 Path: {path} Do you confirm you want to save this project?
addProject.pathNotAllowedStart: ❌ Current path not allowed. The working directory must be in allowed paths.

mcp.title: 🔌 Add MCP Server
mcp.enterName: 📝 Enter the server name (letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only):
mcp.selectType:
🔧 Select server type:
1️⃣ STDIO (local command)
2️⃣ HTTP (remote server)
mcp.enterCommand: ⚙️ Enter the command to execute (e.g., node, python, npx):
mcp.enterArgs:
📋 Enter command arguments (leave empty if none):
Example: server.js --port 3000
mcp.enterUrl: 🌐 Enter the server URL (must start with http:// or https://):
mcp.enterEnv: 🌍 Enter environment variables (format: KEY=VALUE,KEY2=VALUE2) or "-" to skip:
mcp.created:
✅ Server "{name}" created successfully!
✅ Configuration updated. The new server is available.
mcp.invalidName: ❌ Invalid name. Use only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
mcp.invalidUrl: ❌ Invalid URL. Must start with http:// or https://

list.title: 📋 MCP Servers (Page {page}/{total})
list.page: 💡 Use /mcp_list {page} to view the next page
list.emptyWithHelp:
📋 No MCP servers configured.

Use /mcp_add to add one.

commands.invalidType: Invalid type. Use http or stdio.

list.title: 📁 Saved Projects
list.empty:
No saved projects.

Use /addproject to save a project.

add.usage:
Usage: /addproject [alias] [path]
Or use /addproject without arguments for the interactive wizard.

switch.planModeDeactivated: ⚠️ Plan mode has been deactivated (plans are project-specific).

cd.invalidPath: ❌ Invalid path or path not allowed.
cd.planModeDeactivated: ⚠️ Plan mode has been deactivated (plans are project-specific).

extend.maxReached: ⚠️ Maximum timeout duration reached. Cannot extend further.

plan.enter: 📋 Plan mode activated. Copilot will ask for approval before executing tasks.
plan.active: 📋 Plan mode is active. Use /exitplan to deactivate.
plan.activated: 🎯 Plan Mode Activated You can now ask questions about the plan or request its implementation. The conversation will maintain plan context. To exit plan mode: /exitplan

copilot.cliNotAvailable: Copilot CLI not available. Make sure it is installed (npm i -g @github/copilot) and authenticated (run copilot and /login).
copilot.timeout: Timeout: no response received from user

extend.noOperation: ℹ️ No operation in progress to extend
extend.maxReached: ⚠️ Maximum limit of 2 hours reached. Cannot extend further.
extend.errorExtending: ❌ Could not extend timeout. Try again.
extend.errorExtensionWarning: ⚠️ Error extending time. Operation will be cancelled.

bot.waitPlease: ⏳ Wait a moment while I update the configuration...
bot.serverCreatedWithError: ⚠️ Server created but there was an error updating the session: {error}
bot.operationInProgressWait: ⏳ There is already an operation in progress. Please wait.
bot.optionExpired: ⏰ This option has expired. Please use the command {command} again.
bot.rateLimitExceeded: ⏱️ Too many requests. Wait 1 second before sending another message.
bot.pageNotExist: ❌ Page {page} does not exist. Total pages: {total}

callbacks.optionExpiredModel: ⏰ This option has expired. Please use the /model command again.
callbacks.optionExpiredSwitch: ⏰ This option has expired. Please use the /switch command again.
callbacks.optionExpiredMcp: ⏰ This option has expired. Please use the /mcp command again.
callbacks.optionExpiredCd: ⏰ This option has expired. Please use /cd again.
callbacks.optionExpiredAddProject: ⏰ This option has expired. Please use /addproject again.

messageHandler.operationInProgress: ⏳ There is already an operation in progress. Please wait.
messageHandler.heartbeatNoExtensions: ⏳ Task still in progress ({formattedTime}). Remaining time: {remainingMinutes}m. /stop to cancel
messageHandler.heartbeatWithExtensions: ⏳ Task still in progress ({formattedTime}). Remaining time: {remainingMinutes}m. ⏱️ Extended {totalExtensions}x. /stop to cancel

allowlistSetup.title: 🔒 Security Configuration
allowlistSetup.explanation: For security, the bot needs to know which directories it can access.
allowlistSetup.instructions: Send the allowed directories separated by commas: Example: C:\Users\You\Projects, D:\Code
allowlistSetup.tip: 💡 Tip: You only need to do this once.
allowlistSetup.warningsTitle: ⚠️ Some paths are not valid and will be ignored:
allowlistSetup.confirmationQuestion: Confirm to save these paths? Reply with yes or no.
allowlistSetup.cancelled: ❌ Configuration cancelled. The bot will close now.
allowlistSetup.restarting: 🔄 The bot will restart to apply changes...
allowlistSetup.editHint: 💡 You can modify these paths by editing ALLOWED_PATHS in the .env file
allowlistSetup.timeout: ⏰ Session expired due to inactivity. The bot will close now.
allowlistSetup.timeoutMessage: ⏰ Configuration timeout. The bot will close now.
allowlistSetup.manualEdit: Try again or configure ALLOWED_PATHS manually in .env
allowlistSetup.closingBot: Closing bot due to incomplete configuration...

allowlistAdmin.promptAddPath: ⚠️ Path {path} is not allowed. Do you want to add it to ALLOWED_PATHS?
allowlistAdmin.alreadyAllowed: ℹ️ Path {path} is already in ALLOWED_PATHS.
allowlistAdmin.restartingNotice: 🔄 The bot will restart to apply changes.

mcpWizard.alreadyActive: You already have a wizard in progress. Use "cancel" to cancel it first.
mcpWizard.noActiveSession: No active session. Use /mcp_add to start.
mcpWizard.sessionExpired: Session has expired due to inactivity. Please start again with /mcp_add.
mcpWizard.enterName: 📝 Enter the server name (letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only):
mcpWizard.selectType:
🔧 Select server type:
1️⃣ STDIO (local command)
2️⃣ HTTP (remote server)
mcpWizard.enterCommand: ⚙️ Enter the command to execute (e.g., node, python, npx):
mcpWizard.enterUrl: 🌐 Enter the server URL (must start with http:// or https://):
mcpWizard.enterArgs:
📋 Enter command arguments (leave empty if none):
Example: server.js --port 3000
mcpWizard.enterEnv: 🌍 Enter environment variables (format: KEY=VALUE,KEY2=VALUE2) or "-" to skip:
mcpWizard.envParseHelp:
Expected format:
- Simple: KEY=value,KEY2=value2
- Quoted: KEY="value,with,commas"
- Escaped: KEY=value\,escaped

Please try again or send '-' to skip.
mcpWizard.invalidName: ❌ Name can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
mcpWizard.nameAlreadyExists:
❌ A server with name "{name}" already exists.

Try another name:
mcpWizard.confirmDangerous: ⚠️ SECURITY WARNING The command contains dangerous arguments: {flags} Full command: `{command}` {warning} Do you understand the risk and want to continue? Respond: "confirmar" - To add the server (at your own risk) "cancelar" - To cancel the operation
mcpWizard.confirmDangerousInvalid:
⚠️ Invalid response. Respond:
"confirmar" - To confirm and add the server
"cancelar" - To cancel the operation

serverManagement.securityWarning: ⚠️ SECURITY WARNING The command contains flags that could allow arbitrary code execution or security risks.

flagExplanations.-c: Executes shell commands or Python code directly
flagExplanations.--interactive: Interactive mode that allows command execution

serverManagement.securityRecommendation: Only proceed if you trust the source of this command and understand the security implications.

validation.nameInvalid: Name can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
